title: Amtech S8159 Rechargeable PIR Solar Light, Weatherproof Outdoor Solar Light, Motion Detection, Wide Angle Sensor, 100 SMD LEDs
availability_text: Only 4 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Comprehensive PIR Lighting: The Amtech S8159 rechargeable PIR (Passive Infrared Sensor) solar light has a motion detecting function and a wide angle of 270°. It features a 270-degree wide angle, 100 lumens to provide secure detection across an extensive outdoor area. It also provides excellent illumination when required, with its 100 SMD LEDs, which have a much larger beam angle than regular LEDs. Packed with great features, peace of mind benefits and value for money.

Environmentally Friendly Design: The Amtech S8159 outdoor solar light is weatherproof and constructed using durable ABS and polystyrene. The integrated solar panel across the top simply recharges the unit using both sun rays and daylight. No batteries, cables or carbon footprint to worry about.

Smart Lighting Modes: The motion sensor light also features 3 different lighting modes, depending on your requirements across the year or seasons. You can select from a strong to dim light spectrum and you can also switch the unit off when security lighting is not required.

Easy Outdoor Installation: With no battery or cable management to worry about, you can install the outdoor sensor light using the two mounting holes and accesory kit provided. Remember to select a suitable location for the security light to maximise detection and sunlight.
Suitable for: This weatherproof external wall light, can be installed by the entrance of your home, driveway, garage or garden.
description: Product Description Amtech has a fantastic range of essential DIY tools and lighting products for all your household needs. The rechargeable Amtech S8159 Solar Motion Sensor Light provides outdoor lighting without the need for extra cables or batteries. Its weatherproof and easy to install anywhere you please. The PIR sensor will detect movement from up to 3-metres away and within a 120° activation range, plus the SMD LEDs will give you peace of mind illumination – up to 100 lumen output to be precise. Amtech’s great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
